revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Annotated image 4]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Annotated image 4]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Allows to set the color font for the header, and makes the default already darkmode friendly
revision.text:
{| role="presentation" cellpadding="0" style="border-spacing:0; {{#switch: {{{align|}}} | none = | left = clear:left; float:left; | center | centre = margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; border: none; | right | #default = clear:right; float:right; }}" |- |
{{#if:{{{header|}}}|
{{{header}}}
}}
[[Image:{{{image}}}|{{{image-width|300}}}px|alt={{{alt|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{nolink|}}}|yes|link=|link={{{link|COMMONS:File:{{{image}}}}}}}}]]
{{{annotations}}}
{{#if:{{{caption|}}}|
{{#ifeq:{{{icon|}}}|none||
[[File:interactive icon.svg|18px|link=|The image above contains clickable links|alt=The image above contains clickable links]]
}}{{{caption}}}{{#ifeq:{{{nolink|}}}|yes| [[Image:Desc-20.png|15px|link=COMMONS:File:{{{image}}}]]}}
}}
|} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Annotated image 4]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Annotated image 4]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Annotated image 4]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Annotated image 4]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Annotated image 4]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Annotated image 4]]</includeonly>
#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Annotated image 4]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Annotated image 4]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

{| role="presentation" cellpadding="0" style="border-spacing:0; {{#switch: {{{align|}}} | none = | left = clear:left; float:left; | center | centre = margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; border: none; | right | #default = clear:right; float:right; }}" |- |

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
